title: End Platform Fix
description: Prevents the End spawn platform from deleting water when regenerating. Perfect for Obsidian + Sand farm collection
body:
This mod stops the End spawn platform from removing water when a player or item enters the End.

With this fix, you can now create simpler obsidian and sand farms that regenerate and drop items for easy collection.

This is my first Minecraft mod, so there may be bugs I missed.

The mod is open-source! If you run into any issues or have suggestions, feel free to open an issue on GitHub or contact me.

More versions likely on the way.

**Although this is a simple mod, it has not been thoroughly tested, so make backups of your world in case.**
